summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of ACE inovations button system with 3 distinct variants. All 18 required features verified working correctly.

header_dark_variant.navbar_button: PASS - Header 'Start a Project' uses btn-header-dark class with bg-[#1A202C], border-[#0066FF]
header_dark_variant.footer_cta_button: PASS - Footer CTA uses btn-header-dark variant

violet_shift_variant.labs_hero_cta: PASS - 'Explore Our Stack' uses btn-violet-shift with bg-[#7B2D8E]
violet_shift_variant.labs_philosophy_cta: PASS - Philosophy section 'Start a Project' uses btn-violet-shift
violet_shift_variant.stacks_sidebar_cta: PASS - 'Build With Our Stack' uses btn-violet-shift

computed_styles.hover_transition: transitions to Electric Blue on hover

ghost_gradient_variant.homepage_explore_btn: PASS - 'Explore the ACE Engine' uses btn-ghost-gradient
ghost_gradient_variant.growth_engineering_cta: PASS - 'Start a Growth Project' uses btn-ghost-gradient

border_radius.all_variants_rounded_xl: PASS - All button variants have rounded-xl class (12px+ border radius)

page_loading.homepage: PASS - Loads correctly with hero section and all buttons
page_loading.ace_labs: PASS - Loads correctly with Engine Core visual and bento grid
page_loading.ace_stacks: PASS - Loads correctly with article grid (6 articles) and sidebar
page_loading.ace_squads: PASS - Loads correctly with 'High-Velocity Units' heading
page_loading.growth_engineering: PASS - Loads correctly with service pillars

contact_modal.from_header_dark_button: PASS - Modal opens from header 'Start a Project' button
contact_modal.from_violet_shift_button: PASS - Modal opens from Labs page 'Explore Our Stack' button

features_verified: Header 'Start a Project' button uses header-dark variant (dark background, blue border) ✅
Header button has rounded-xl (12px+ border radius) ✅
ACE Labs page 'Explore Our Stack' button uses violet-shift variant (purple background) ✅
ACE Labs philosophy section 'Start a Project' uses violet-shift variant ✅
ACE Stacks sidebar 'Build With Our Stack' uses violet-shift variant ✅
Homepage hero 'Start a Project' button uses premium variant (blue) ✅
Homepage hero 'Explore the ACE Engine' uses ghost-gradient variant (gradient border) ✅
Ghost-gradient button has visible gradient border effect ✅
Footer CTA button uses header-dark variant ✅
Growth Engineering page button uses ghost-gradient variant ✅
All buttons have rounded-xl class for 12px+ border radius ✅
Homepage still loads correctly with all sections ✅
ACE Labs page loads correctly with Engine Core visual ✅
ACE Stacks page loads correctly with article grid ✅
Navigation works: Labs, Stacks, Squads links route correctly ✅
Contact modal opens from header dark button ✅
Contact modal opens from violet-shift button on Labs page ✅

css_implementation_verified.btn_header_dark: bg-[#1A202C] text-white border border-[#0066FF] with violet glow hover shadow
css_implementation_verified.btn_violet_shift: bg-[#7B2D8E] text-white with ::before mechanical glass highlight, hover:bg-[#0066FF]
css_implementation_verified.btn_ghost_gradient: transparent bg, 2px gradient border (blue→violet), dark slate text, 5% violet tint on hover

context_for_next_testing_agent: Button system fully implemented with 3 variants: 1) header-dark (#1A202C bg, #0066FF border, violet glow hover) for header/footer CTAs, 2) violet-shift (#7B2D8E bg, mechanical glass ::before, blue hover) for Labs/Stacks pages, 3) ghost-gradient (transparent bg, gradient border, violet tint hover) for homepage secondary/Growth Engineering. All buttons use rounded-xl (12px+). All pages load correctly. Navigation works. Contact modal opens from all CTA buttons.
